author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Cached position embeddings: 0.99s/tok decode (marginal improvement from 1.0s). The bottleneck is definitively the ~600 individual CUDA API calls per token. Each call has driver overhead regardless of compute size. Reaching 100+ tok/s requires reducing the number of CUDA API calls per token from 600 to <10. The only ways to do that: (1) CUDA graphs (single graph launch replaces all 600 calls), (2) massive kernel fusion (flash attention + fused MLP + fused LN+Linear). CUDA graphs are the most impactful single change.
